textByHashes.42e8070ad4eb7e4c75d1fbe0765f9679b8b9a9a3: I understand your concerns, Ambassador, but you must realise that the discoveries must change the whole schedule. To remove them too hurriedly would be a crime against knowledge.
textByHashes.129de24ff289b743ce7a374117a4b39ee6538a29: It's the new underground train link being built between our city and the dwarven city of Keldagrim.
textByHashes.db03b9506244d97190af57f8bddc03ca9df85ef5: We've unearthed some very important artefacts that were buried during the Dorgeshuun Civil War. They could shed important light on our history.
textByHashes.ed1e4ef1ec9bcb21919da6b09f42da7ca2b867e6: , do you have any experience with archaeology?
textByHashes.910b52824ece9553ed92a910a81f89d95312e3de: Excellent! We have not had a major archaeological project for generations, so if you could give us some help we would appreciate it.
textByHashes.4e984fe27547745c02bff437cadfc72d65b37855: Splendid! The path to the train tunnel is in the south- west of the city.
textByHashes.fd53d7f059dadadab0ea92ef603739fdf9c02b20: Oh well. We will continue at our own pace.
textByHashes.8fb449962c8fdedd75ce0390f1e6b10a406706f6: Why don't you visit the market? I hear there is quite a craze for surface foods at the moment, so you might be able to sell something there.
textByHashes.febea8fb1f312c93c93e38030ea8365d03e564a3: You might also want to visit the caves to the south of the city. There are many monsters to fight there, and Zanik apparently found ways to cross over their heads!
textByHashes.0ec168943c2ce3e0d71cdefc136ae60e47ec3ec3: For trade, and for fostering goodwill between races! I am sure that it will benefit both our races.
textByHashes.e1d61a60bb435497cabbea7675701291627b9eaf: How is the archaeological dig going?
textByHashes.74fbf2d92e53aeb40085e5c7d68adeb01eaaa737: It gives me great pleasure to declare this new train link open!
textByHashes.80f199034018f22748e6f62dd6e423c3d9189e7c: , Zanik has told me about your exploits. It seems that all the Dorgeshuun owe you our lives once again.
textByHashes.cb702b43bedc55c860010f62dd3360b87dfcb551: As a reward, I suggest you keep the ancient goblin mace that you helped to excavate.
textByHashes.ea933bab6ff6e7b099dfe366356c76c7ed2286f4: Most of the Dorgeshuun would be happy if such a war-like artefact was kept outside the city, and I am sure you will keep it in safe hands.
textByHashes.7c3f9ec8b85a5800cd40b19f9f8cd631bf5f49df: Welcome back, Zanik. What have you to report?
textByHashes.9a329019ec4719c838de7a66265a2dd9bdc00774: You stopped them this time, but the surface still poses a danger. The council has been debating how much contact we should have with it, and wants you to make a recommendation.
textByHashes.75d8e210da86d6e591da8fa765469e0a8ac860d0: , we are in your debt once again.
textByHashes.b2b0bf397a2ec8ba87aabe079ad33a4c621b9b31: The council has voted that, if Zanik's recommendation was positive, humans from Lumbridge should be allowed into the city. You may now enter Dorgesh-Kaan!
textByHashes.cc8d9a0524d4103906445779b9e4fc2fd9aabe3d: A surface goblin? What are you doing in the city?
textByHashes.c0cdf8e602266f826711cf9bb9a789cbce896820: That is somewhat irregular, but I suppose it is reasonable. Welcome to the city, surface goblin! What brings you to Dorgesh-Kaan?
textByHashes.1752e883c373a96b9588ba2c2d1b596b91dd4704: Ah yes, of course. I think she has been helping Oldak with his experiments recently. You should check Oldak's lab.
textByHashes.8041a27a0d18bdbd0fa5f2797ba91ecf74ac8225: I apologize for the damage to your cellar. I will send workers to repair the hole.
textByHashes.61a18246fcd1ddcc0c04d35a8e05d967b22c2df6: I too thank you. Accept the freedom of the Dorgeshuun mines.
textByHashes.caeee0a823f6533041be57ed40cfbdefebbfc937: These are strange times. I never dreamed that I would see the surface, still less that I would be on friendly terms with its people.
textByHashes.04f03301f417bedd4cc958d0f4cc7fb191d012c0: Zanik, the council is still very concerned about the city's safety. If you hear of any more H.A.M. activity on the surface, you must let me know.
textByHashes.d5018771dc225aa70b062a800115e0df3f47e270: And another thing. If you must visit the surface, the council asks that you be careful not to offend the surface-dwellers' customs.
textByHashes.6f5ffeb3686adb84e26aeebcf7fe44b72568e9fe: Remember in particular to scrupulously observe the Lumbridge-Dorgeshuun treaty...
